name: homebridge
description: Homebridge + Config UI X on the jailbroken rootless iPad

invalid_locale.notes: Use shell_env/start script: unset LC_ALL then set LC_CTYPE/LANG.

port_in_use.notes: Identify exact owner; do not broad kill.

known_issues.tmux: invalid LC_ALL, LC_CTYPE or LANG: Clear inherited LC_ALL with unset LC_ALL, then set LC_CTYPE=UTF-8 LANG=en_US.UTF-8.
known_issues.EADDRINUSE: Clean targeted orphan Homebridge/UI/tmux processes, then restart with start-hb-tmux.sh.
known_issues.EXIT:138: Do not use homebridge-config-ui-x v5 on this iPad; use v4.65.0.
known_issues.ports closed immediately after start: Do not fail immediately; wait/retry for up to retry_seconds because Node needs time to bind ports.
